title: Barfi (Doodh Barfi)

ingredients.title: Ingredients
items: Ghee (Clarified Butter) – 2 tsp (plus extra for greasing)
Saffron Strands – 6–8 (optional, soaked in 1 tbsp warm milk)
Chopped Pistachios or Almonds – 2 tsp (for garnish)

instruction.title: Make Fresh Khoya (Milk Solids)
steps: Boil milk in a heavy-bottomed pan.
Reduce the flame and simmer, stirring frequently to prevent sticking.
Cook until milk thickens to a dense, grainy, semi-solid consistency (this is khoya).

instruction.title: Add Sugar & Flavor
steps: Cook until mixture thickens and starts leaving the sides of the pan.
Mix in ghee, cardamom powder, and saffron milk if using.

instruction.title: Set the Barfi
steps: Grease a tray or shallow plate with ghee.
Spread the hot mixture evenly, smoothing the top with a spatula.
Sprinkle chopped nuts and silver leaf (vark) for a professional finish.

instruction.title: Cut & Serve
steps: Cut into squares or diamonds while slightly warm.
Serve at room temperature for the best texture.

chefTips: Constant Stirring – Prevents grainy texture and burning at the base.
Full-Fat Milk Only – Ensures creamy, rich taste.
Flavor Balance – Cardamom and saffron should be subtle, not overpowering.
Plating – For a luxury look, garnish with silver leaf, edible rose petals, or gold-dusted pistachio slivers.
